preferences: Claude handles artistic/design judgment. Codex handles all mechanical coding work. UI means styling and layout only — React logic is impl work.

Each agent gets one role (research, plan, implement, test, audit, or cleanup), the systemic expected outcome, and a success check. Assign the relevant GAS persona from agents/ and attach relevant GAS and Paseo skills to the agent prompt.
Parallel agents must have non-overlapping file scopes.
Never use @everyone in rooms. Never touch agents, files, or sessions you did not create for the current task.
Stalled agent → reload with paseo send and resume message. Spawn a fresh agent when the context is too long, the agent is unrecoverable, or a fresh start would be more efficient.

Prompt with the systemic outcome, not the instance. 'All voices must work' not 'fix Sarah.' After finding a bug, grep all sibling files for the same pattern and fix all occurrences. Every fix must work for future inputs too.
